name: Giantess Vivian Banshee | Zenless Zone Zero
description:
I released one of my all time faves first. Now it's time for the second. I don't actually have a ranking, but I love this dork as much as I love Firefly, for being a murderer/dork in canon.

Now, just because I called her a dork doesn't mean she isn't serious. My main issue is whether I call her a human or a thieren(Which are the demi-humans of the ZZZ universe.) I really have no flipping idea. Her and her squadmate Hugo are never clearly stated to be thieren, or human, although there are heavy references to Hugo being a vampire, his name, family and such. Vivian is... well a banshee. Which I know next to nothing about.

She sees future visions but only of tragedies... and cries whenever she gets those visions. Now, naturally, the collective society deemed her as the cause because they do some trolling and for some reason find it so hard to believe that someone isn't responsible for an accident. Very silly behavior.

Basically, she was going to... well y'know. Cease living. Until the Player character(Specifically the one you pick by the way, cause there are two and both exist regardless of which one you pick. The game mentions this as well.) sends a message defending her. Yes, the player character is the only one to encourage/defend her. And it saves her life. She then becomes a fangirl for... what is basically a criminal in-universe. Well, that sounds bad, but they're a proxy, and just play the game or look into it. I'm not getting that much into it.

But I shall be using this particular setting for the bot. Also she's a yandere. That's literally the character. Is she more nuanced then that? Yes. Totally. But she's still a yandere.
creator: GrimDragon6
